## Charter compliance (required)
- [ ] Academic/technical only; **no primary sociolinguistic field data**.
- [ ] Backed by a **verifiable DOI** (Zenodo/OSF/journal) where substantive; published/timestamped before this PR.
- [ ] **Compatible license** (code GPL-3.0-or-later; docs CC BY 4.0). I have the right to contribute this.
- [ ] **National-narrative neutral**; nothing that would make participation unsafe for anyone.
- [ ] I did **not** change the kernel (scripts/languages are additive), or I explain why a kernel change is justified.
